name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
Project Drydock

Drydock is a Github Spec Kit Superset - A Full SDLC Specification Driven Development Framework that has built a ~200K token specification reliably using Sonnet. You are the Commander and the LLM is your Agile Best Practice Dev Team.

Innovations/Discoveries include:

  • A method of context compaction
  • The Quarterdeck is a simple config driven UI that manages Commander to LLM interactions at every phase and enables control of the agile process.
  • An effective graph database to enable efficient initial builds and ongoing product maintenance
  • Effective brainstorming process for Blueprint iteration which persists your decisions and keeps a running log.
  • Scoring and rating systems including claude<=>codex interactions designed to improve the agents themselves based on test/sample projects.

Feedback from Claude and Codex indicate it is significantly advanced compared to other specification methodologies.

Drydock is in active development - I have laid the keel, have the scaffolding working, and am iterating the code - using Drydock !

Drydock Documentation ↗

Recent White Papers

  • How to Iterate in Spec Driven Design ↗How to change the spec and target so you can reproduce — four tries and my choice.
  • Your Agile Team — SDD Build Model ↗For small token-count work — an agile workflow for uncertainty management; you are Product Owner.
  • The Marina Framework ↗My big SDD implementation — a trust and sharing architecture on AWS.
  • My Workstation Setup ↗My workstation and how I work on projects — WSL, Docker, tooling.

Project Marina - working but not polished / on hold

The Marina is a Trust and Interoperability platform into which you can "dock" your projects. Process Based Methodology (my book) and scale-proven Technology Rules combine to "conform" your projects so they expose/encapsulate capabilities and enable an Enterprise Command Center. I have a working draft built by the prototype for Drydock and this project will resurface when Drydock is done. I could not get the quality i needed from my Drydock Prototype so i am closing those gaps.

  • Project Capabilities CatalogServices, Data, Shared Resources.
  • Agents enforce standardsYour Stack best practices, Your branding, and Automatic security.
  • Conformed DocumentationConsistent docs across all your projects.
  • Enterprise Command CenterLogging, Monitoring & Alerting, Scheduling, Pipelines.
  • AWS IntegrationSingle Library For AWS Service Integration - Built on their ultra low cost services.
